policy.description: Blocking line-coverage ratchets. Update measured counts in the same reviewed change whenever scope or coverage advances; never lower a floor without an explicit, justified scope change.

tolerance.rationale: A clean GitHub Actions Node 22/V8 run on 2026-07-16 measured 1436 covered lines across the 1759-line core scope after adding the shared document-relative Jellyfin SPA route builders. Focused V8 evidence exercised every new executable line, including encoded parameters, invalid routes, and the parameter-free path. One line permits only negligible instrumentation variance.

Two clean reviewed local .NET 10/Coverlet integration runs on 2026-07-16 both measured 16412 covered lines across the identical 25066-line combined scope after adding bounded SearchHint hierarchy resolution with Jellyfin 12 enabled-library TopParentIds and the versioned bookmark logical-identity schema. The bookmark work added 46 instrumented lines beyond the reviewed 16366/25020 hidden-search baseline and covered all 46 through clone, equality, validation, dedicated-add, batch, and golden persistence evidence. The existing two-line tolerance remains narrow and covers only the previously reproduced one-line instrumentation variance (0.0080 percentage points).
